title: Dense Indulgent Spanish Fish Croquetas
description: Herbal, dense Spanish fish croquetas featuring fish seasoning and mother sauce base. Suitable for Jain food options.

ingredients.name: Cod Fish Roe
ingredients.notes: Add extra richness and flavor to the croquetas

instructions: Mix cod fish, onion, garlic, turmeric, paprika, salt, and black pepper in a bowl until well combined.
Add cod fish roe and mix until a uniform texture is achieved.
In a separate bowl, whisk together warm oil and flour until a smooth paste.
Add the flour paste to the fish mixture and mix until a thick, cohesive dough forms.
Cover the dough and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
When ready to fry, heat 1-2 inches of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat until it reaches 350°F (175°C).
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the dough mixture into the hot oil, being careful not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the croquetas for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the croquetas from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
